input.headline: Woman starts movement to meet friends without going broke

raw.headline: Woman starts movement to meet friends without going broke

winner: Why did the woman start a group for meeting friends without going broke? Because she heard that friendship shouldn't cost a fortune... or at least not more than a casual lunch!

candidates.text: Why don't wealthier friends join the "Meet Friends Without Going Broke" movement? Because they can afford to meet with their broke friends... at the bank!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with the bank, ties back to the headline, concise and specific."}

candidates.text: Why did the woman start a group for meeting friends without going broke? Because she heard that friendship shouldn't cost a fortune... or at least not more than a casual lunch!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.0, "reason": "The joke is concise, specific, and delivers a mild surprise by connecting friendship with cost in a relatable way."}

candidates.text: A woman started a movement to meet friends... for free? I guess they're calling it Friendship on a Budget.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks surprise and specificity. The pun on 'Friendship on a Budget' is mild and not particularly clever or original."}

candidates.text: Why did the penny join the friendship group? Because it was looking for change!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline through the word 'change,' but it's a bit forced and lacks specificity in connecting to the theme of not going broke."}

candidates.text: Why don't friendless people need money for meetings anymore? Because they can always go solo!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and surprise. It's a bit generic and relies on a pun that doesn't fully align with the context of the headline."}
